ariaSpec.usage: The TaskBoard has role=application as its inner navigation requires the use of arrows.
The TaskBoard Column cards container is a collection of list items.
The TaskBoard Column cards container must be focusable.
The TaskBoard Column cards container must be labelled by its column header.
The TaskBoard Column actions are buttons.
Each action must have an accessible name as they are represented by icons.
The cards inner container must not break the list-listitem relationship.
The TaskBoard Tasks (cards) are list items.
The TaskBoard Card must be focusable.
The TaskBoard card menu element must be a button.
The menu button must have an accessible name as it is represented by an icon.
The TaskBoard edit form close element must be a button.
The edit form close button must have an accessible name.
The edit Form needs the appropriate role.
The TaskBoard edit form must be labeled by the header text of the pane.

kbSpec.behavior: Navigates through the TaskBoard tab stops - the ToolBar, each Column, column action buttons, each Card, popup items, and pane fields/buttons.
Focuses the previous column or a card in the previous column.
Focuses the next column or a card in the next column.

Deletes the currently focused item. When focus is on a card, deletes the card. When focus is on a column, deletes the column. If delete confirmation is enabled, opens a confirmation dialog instead of deleting immediately.
Puts the focused card or column in edit mode.
Creates a new card or column. Creating a card is blocked when the target column has reached its WIP limit.
Moves focus to the previous popup item.
Moves focus to the next popup item.
Closes the popup and returns focus to the actions button.
When focus is in the title field, saves the current changes.
When focus is in the description field, saves the current changes.
Closes the pane and returns focus to the element that opened it.
Moves focus to the next field or action in the pane.
Moves focus to the previous field or action in the pane.
